scope: MiMo V2.5 JANGTQ_2 video preprocessing cache and direct video-placeholder routing after source fix

vmlx_engine/models/mllm.py: Direct MLXMultimodalLM chat now expands video placeholders to image-frame placeholders for mimo_v2 as well as gemma4_unified and step3p7.
Direct MLXMultimodalLM stream_chat now uses the same gemma4_unified/step3p7/mimo_v2 video-placeholder expansion set as nonstream chat.
vmlx_engine/vision_embedding_cache.py: PixelCacheEntry now carries optional video_pixel_values and video_grid_thw so video processor outputs can survive cache hits.
vmlx_engine/mllm_batch_generator.py: Batched MLLM pixel-cache restore now restores video_pixel_values and video_grid_thw from cache entries.
Batched MLLM pixel-cache store now stores video-only requests when video_pixel_values is present, not only image requests with pixel_values.

verification.focused_tests: passed: 26 selected MiMo media tests in tests/test_mimo_v2_media_runtime.py and tests/test_mimo_v2_media_capability_gate.py

startup.media_overlay: MiMo-V2 media runtime auto-enabled from preserved bundle contract: vision=True audio=True
startup.media_bound: MiMo-V2 load bound preserved media weights: visual=364 audio_encoder=75 speech_embeddings=20
startup.media_assigned: MiMo-V2 load assigned 459 preserved media tensors to runtime modules
startup.cache_layout: mixed full KVCache plus RotatingKVCache across 48 layers
startup.generic_turboquant_kv: skipped by design for MiMo native asymmetric full/SWA RotatingKVCache metadata

request.prompt: What color dominates this video? Answer one word.

live_repeated_video_probe.classification: video preprocessing cache reuse is live and no longer structurally image-only; MiMo visual semantic correctness remains red because the red fixture was answered as White.

must_not_claim: Do not claim MiMo JANGTQ_2 visual quality is green: the red video still answered White.
Do not claim MiMo exactness is fixed: text exactness still mutates MIMO-OK to MIMOOK in current live proof.
Do not claim release readiness, installed-app parity, or L2 restore from this artifact.
other_agent_next: Consume the video-cache source fix when rebuilding the dev app or package; rerun MiMo JANGTQ_2 UI video cache rows after the app includes these files.
For MiMo JANGTQ_2 visual quality, compare source/dequant/reference vision embeddings or logits against the quant artifact; current evidence points beyond request routing/cache preservation.
For MiMo exactness, continue artifact/logit/quant-contract diagnosis rather than parser, JSON repair, sampling clamp, prefix cache, or L2 chasing.
